label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why foreign kids want to learn Chinese. The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to look at the text provided. The passage starts by mentioning that Chinese is popular among foreign kids, but it's harder to learn. The example of Piao Chenglong from South Korea is given. He says English is easier, but he still wants to learn Chinese to study at Peking University. Then it goes on to talk about South Korea having many Chinese learners and competitions. Also, the Chinese Ministry of Education mentions 130 million learners in 85 countries, expecting that number to rise to 800 million. In America, Chinese is the second most popular foreign language. The text then states that people want to learn Chinese because China is becoming an important country for business, and the Chinese government is helping by sending teachers and setting up Confucius Colleges. So the main reason given in the text for why foreigners want to learn Chinese is the growing importance of China in the world. The last paragraph says: "People want to learn Chinese because China is becoming such an important country. Foreign countries want to understand China better to help them with business." Looking at the options: A) Because Chinese is getting more important in their schools. The text says Chinese is popular in foreign schools, but the reason given for learning is China's importance. Also, the first sentence mentions English is getting more important in schools, but Chinese is popular among foreign kids. So A is not the main reason stated. B) Because Chinese characters have too many strokes. The text actually uses this as a point that Chinese is harder to learn (as per Piao's opinion), not a reason for learning it. So B is incorrect. C) Because the number of people learning Chinese will be 800 million. The text mentions this as a future projection, but it's not stated as the reason people learn it. The reason is the importance of China, not the number of learners. So C is not correct. D) Because China is becoming more
